prompt: Position comparison: cutoff or button can enter after early seats are out. Compared with early position, classify how many hands late position can include.
why_v1: Wider means late position can include more hands than early position.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. Late position is wider because cutoff and button ranges can include more hands than early position.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. Late position is wider because fewer players remain behind, so more hands can stay in the range.
